torch.name: Torch
torch.description: A guttering torch, its flame weak but persistent.

iron_key.name: Iron Key
iron_key.description: A heavy iron key, cold and slick with age. The bow is shaped like a serpent devouring its own tail.

rusty_sword.name: Rusty Sword
rusty_sword.description: A once-proud blade, now eaten by rust. The edge still catches what little light exists.

ancient_scroll.name: Ancient Scroll
ancient_scroll.description: Sealed with black wax marked by a broken sigil. It hums faintly when touched.

bone_amulet.name: Bone Amulet
bone_amulet.description: A carved bone amulet on a rotted cord. The darkness grows slightly less aggressive when you hold it.
